# Clausemaster — LLM Context

> Clausemaster is an AI-powered contract analysis platform built by TODO.LAW. Upload a contract (PDF, DOCX, or TXT) and get instant clause-by-clause breakdown, issue flagging, and jurisdiction-specific legal insights.

## Public Pages

- [Homepage](https://clausemaster.todo.law): Platform overview, three-step analysis workflow
- [Documentation Hub](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs): Full platform documentation
- [Analysis Pipeline](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/analysis): How the AI analysis works
- [Publisher Program](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/publisher): LegalSkills publisher program and revenue share
- [Internal Skills](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/internal): Creating internal analysis skills
- [Revenue Share](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/revenue-share): 70/30 publisher revenue model
- [Client Guide](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/client): End-user guide for contract analysis
- [Reviews](https://clausemaster.todo.law/docs/reviews): Expert review workflow

## What Clausemaster Does

- **Three-Step AI Pipeline**:
  1. **Classification**: Identify contract type, jurisdiction, parties, and effective date
  2. **Clause Extraction**: Summarize each clause with legal significance and bias assessment
  3. **Issue Flagging**: Flag issues by severity (Info / Warning / Critical)
- **Multi-Format Support**: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT contracts
- **Jurisdiction-Specific Insights**: Analysis calibrated to applicable legal jurisdictions
- **LegalSkills Integration**: Extensible analysis through the TODO.LAW Skills marketplace
- **Skill Draft Generation**: AI-assisted creation of new analysis skills from contract patterns
- **Publisher Revenue Share**: 70% revenue share for legal professionals who publish analysis skills
- **Multi-Platform Export**: Export analysis reports in multiple formats

## TODO.LAW Ecosystem

Clausemaster is part of the TODO.LAW platform for AI-native legal services:

- **Dealroom** (dealroom.todo.law) — Contract negotiation
- **DPO Central** (dpocentral.todo.law) — Privacy compliance management
- **AI Sentinel** (aisentinel.todo.law) — AI governance and EU AI Act compliance
- **Seneca** (seneca.todo.law) — Privacy litigation research
- **Vendor.Watch** (vendor.watch) — SaaS vendor compliance database
- **Clausemaster** (clausemaster.todo.law) — AI-powered contract analysis
- **Gavel** (gavel.todo.law) — Digital arbitration protocol

For full ecosystem context, see: https://todo.law/llms-full.txt
